changeSet.author: kernel-hardening
changeSet.comment: P1 PR-8: First-class persistence for site membership requests

changeSet.author: kernel-hardening
changeSet.comment: P1 PR-8: Backfill legacy site membership requests from user preferences
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO site_membership_requests ( id, site_id, username, site_title, requested_role, message, status, requested_at, decision_by, decision_at, decision_comment ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.username, s.id) gen_random_uuid(), s.id, u.username, COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'siteTitle'), ''), s.title), COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'role'), ''), 'CONSUMER'), NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'message'), ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'status'), ''), 'PENDING'), COALESCE(NULLIF(req->>'requestedAt', '')::timestamp, now()), NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'decisionBy'), ''), NULLIF(req->>'decisionAt', '')::timestamp, NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'decisionComment'), '') FROM users u CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(u.preferences -> 'siteMembershipRequests', '[]'::jsonb)) req JOIN sites s ON lower(s.site_id) = lower(NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'siteId'), '')) AND s.is_deleted = false WHERE NULLIF(BTRIM(req->>'siteId'), '') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.username, s.id, COALESCE(NULLIF(req->>'requestedAt', '')::timestamp, now()) DESC
